K34-A3E.summary: Runtime server-side room filter (OR) + classroom capacity union (primary+additional, dedup). User manual verification PASSED on all 5 surfaces. 36/36 PASS.

K34-A3F.summary: Worktree cleanup (K22 generatedAt drift restored; 3 K28-B untracked preserved as unrelated) + acceptance closeout. No business code changes. 25/25 PASS.

k22GeneratedAtDrift.method: git checkout -- (uncommitted local re-runs of K22-C verify generated timestamp drift; no functional change)
k22GeneratedAtDrift.rationale: Drift was purely the generatedAt timestamp; restoring keeps the K22 expected files locked to their last committed (K34-A3D) state. K22-C re-run during K34-A3F will leave no drift in the final worktree.

k28BUntracked.rationale: Pre-existing K28-B manual trial artifacts unrelated to K34-A3 multi-room. K34-A3F scope explicitly forbids committing these; closeout doc records them as pre-existing unrelated untracked. They remain visible in git status but are not part of this commit.

filesAdded.purpose: Read-only closeout verify (25 checks: schema, Prisma, code, K22/K28-B untracked, closeout doc)

validationChain.k26K4C: 32/36 — 4 fails are pre-existing baseline hardcodes (lint 184/146 vs current 191/154, auth 53/1 vs current 60/62). K22-C, schema, score weights, HC6, K22 expected all PASS per script.
validationChain.lint: 191 errors / 154 warnings (unchanged from K34-A3D; no new lint issues introduced by K34-A3F)
